title: Quiz: Introduction to Financial Markets
description: Test your understanding of financial market structure and mechanics

questions.question: Which financial market has the highest daily trading volume globally?
questions.explanation: The forex market is the largest financial market with daily trading volume exceeding $6 trillion, far surpassing equity and bond markets.

questions.question: What does a derivative's value depend on?

options.text: Only the issuing company's financial statements
The price of one or more underlying assets

questions.explanation: A derivative is a financial contract whose value is derived from the price of underlying assets such as stocks, bonds, commodities, or interest rates.

questions.question: What is the bid-ask spread?

options.text: The difference between today's and yesterday's price
The difference between the highest buy price and lowest sell price

questions.explanation: The bid-ask spread is the difference between the highest price a buyer is willing to pay (bid) and the lowest price a seller is willing to accept (ask).

questions.question: Which order type guarantees execution but not price?
questions.explanation: A market order executes immediately at the best available price, guaranteeing execution but not the specific price.

questions.question: When you buy a bond, you become a partial owner of the issuing company.
questions.explanation: False. Buying a bond makes you a creditor (lender), not an owner. Buying equity (stock) makes you a partial owner.

questions.question: Why is portfolio optimization considered a difficult computational problem?

options.text: The number of possible portfolios grows exponentially with assets

questions.explanation: Portfolio optimization is computationally hard because the number of possible asset combinations grows exponentially - for 1000 assets, possible portfolios exceed 10^80.

questions.question: What potential speedup can quantum computing offer for Monte Carlo simulations?
questions.explanation: Quantum amplitude estimation can provide quadratic speedup for Monte Carlo methods, reducing convergence from O(1/ε²) to O(1/ε).

questions.question: Which of the following are types of derivatives? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: Options, futures, and swaps are all derivatives. Common stock is equity (ownership), not a derivative.
